game_name: Broken Sword: The Shadow of the Templars

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Witness assassination, establish core mechanic for examining environment and NPCs
Recover manuscript from hotel safe, establish item-based progression
Learn puzzle clues and plot information through conversation icons
Combine collected items to solve environmental puzzles and progress
Decode Knights Templar manuscript containing location clues across Europe/Middle East
New locations unlock on map as story progresses; navigate between Paris, Ireland, and beyond
Investigate excavation sites, recover gems and artifacts mentioned in manuscript
Evade antagonists pursuing manuscript; escalates tension through pursuit mechanics
Assist kidnapped NPCs, recover dropped items, raise narrative stakes
Uncover sinister cult plot; escalates through assassinations and character deaths

typical_relief_triggers: Successful item collection and puzzle solving
Safe dialogue sequences revealing plot information
Reaching new documented location on map
Recovery of key artifacts (gem, tripod, manuscript pages)
typical_tension_triggers: Pursuit by Khan and rival thugs
NPC abductions and character deaths (Plantard, Marquet)
Locked inventory gates requiring document clues to progress
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating investigation and action sequences; mystery exposition punctuated by rising danger from Khan and competing factions; discovery-driven pacing where document clues unlock new geographic locations and escalate stakes

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Clickable environment objects yield clues; thorough examination of locations rewards puzzle solutions

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to core mechanics through safe examination phase in Paris; simple item collection and dialogue; establish conspiracy mystery
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Geographic expansion to Ireland and additional European locations; complexity of item combinations increases; evasion sequences with antagonists introduce moderate danger
difficulty_curve.late_game: Escalating antagonist threat (Khan becomes persistent across locations); multiple competing factions pursuing manuscript; character deaths and raised narrative stakes; complex multi-step puzzles leveraging collected artifacts
notable_spikes: Initial assassination in Paris café (establishes danger threshold)
Marquet murder and museum heist prevention (action sequence escalation)
Khan's repeated pursuit across multiple locations (persistent threat elevation)

notable_level_patterns.description: Multiple interconnected locations within a region (Paris café, hotel, hospital, museum) where player revisits areas to gather clues; horizontal expansion rather than linear progression
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Paris opening act: café witness → hotel manuscript recovery → hospital interrogation → museum investigation

notable_level_patterns.description: Manuscript clues explicitly direct player to next geographic region; map expansion is narrative-gated by discovery rather than exploration; creates structured geographical flow
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Manuscript mentions tripod → museum reveals origin from Lochmarne, Ireland → geographic unlock triggers Ireland acts

notable_level_patterns.description: Multi-part sequences involving excavation sites, artifact recovery, and NPC information extraction; combines environmental puzzle-solving with character interaction
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Lochmarne dig site: meet archaeologist assistant → learn about Peagram disappearance → locate mural → recover gem from excavation
